SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Misc

Class ROM

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.Misc.ROM
public class ROM extends Object
Represents a Game Boy ROM image loaded from disk.

The class exposes the raw image bytes together with the cartridge header fields needed for mapper selection and bank sizing.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ROM(String filename)
    Loads a ROM image from the supplied path.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Creates a ROM directly from raw bytes.

    FromBytes(String filename, byte[] romBytes, String displayName, List<String> patchNames, List<String> patchSourcePaths)
    Creates a ROM directly from raw bytes while preserving patch identity.
    int
    GetCartridgeTypeCode()
    Returns the raw cartridge type byte from the ROM header.
    int[]
    GetData()
    Returns the ROM bytes as unsigned values.
    int
    GetDeclaredRomBankCount()
    Returns the bank count declared by the header.
    int
    GetEffectiveRomBankCount()
    Returns the effective bank count derived from the file length.
    int
    GetExternalRamSizeBytes()
    Returns the external RAM size in bytes.
    String
    GetHeaderTitle()
    Returns the title stored in the cartridge header when present.
    CartridgeMapperType
    GetMapperType()
    Returns the mapper family derived from the header.
    String
    GetName()
    Returns the ROM display name without the file extension.
    List<String>
    GetPatchNames()
    Returns the applied IPS patch names in application order.
    List<String>
    GetPatchSourcePaths()
    Returns the applied IPS patch source paths in application order.
    String
    GetSourceName()
    Returns the underlying ROM filename without the file extension.
    String
    GetSourcePath()
    Returns the original ROM source path used to create this cartridge image.
    boolean
    HasBatteryBackedSave()
    Returns whether this cartridge uses battery-backed save storage.
    boolean
    IsCgbCompatible()
    Returns whether the cartridge advertises CGB compatibility.
    boolean
    IsCgbEnhanced()
    Returns whether the cartridge can boot on both GB and GBC hardware while exposing GBC-specific enhancements when available.
    boolean
    IsCgbOnly()
    Returns whether the cartridge requires Game Boy Color hardware.
    static ROM
    LoadPatched(ROM baseRom, String patchFilename)
    Applies an IPS patch to an already loaded ROM image.
    static ROM
    LoadPatched(ROM baseRom, String patchFilename, String patchDisplayName)
    Applies an IPS patch to an already loaded ROM image using an explicit display name for the patch layer.
    static ROM
    LoadPatched(String romFilename, String patchFilename)
    Loads a ROM from disk and applies an IPS patch to it.
    static ROM
    LoadPatched(String romFilename, String patchFilename, String patchDisplayName)
    Loads a ROM from disk and applies an IPS patch to it using an explicit display name for the patch layer.
    byte[]
    ToByteArray()
    Returns a byte-for-byte copy of the ROM image.

  • Constructor Details

    • ROM

      public ROM(String filename)
      Loads a ROM image from the supplied path.
      Parameters:
      filename - ROM path

  • Method Details

    • LoadPatched

      public static ROM LoadPatched(String romFilename, String patchFilename) throws IOException
      Loads a ROM from disk and applies an IPS patch to it.
      Parameters:
      romFilename - base ROM path
      patchFilename - IPS patch path
      Returns:
      patched ROM image
      Throws:
      IOException - when either file cannot be read

    • LoadPatched

      public static ROM LoadPatched(String romFilename, String patchFilename, String patchDisplayName) throws IOException
      Loads a ROM from disk and applies an IPS patch to it using an explicit display name for the patch layer.
      Parameters:
      romFilename - base ROM path
      patchFilename - IPS patch path
      patchDisplayName - patch name shown in the UI and save identity
      Returns:
      patched ROM image
      Throws:
      IOException - when either file cannot be read

    • LoadPatched

      public static ROM LoadPatched(ROM baseRom, String patchFilename) throws IOException
      Applies an IPS patch to an already loaded ROM image.
      Parameters:
      baseRom - base ROM image
      patchFilename - IPS patch path
      Returns:
      patched ROM image
      Throws:
      IOException - when the patch file cannot be read

    • LoadPatched

      public static ROM LoadPatched(ROM baseRom, String patchFilename, String patchDisplayName) throws IOException
      Applies an IPS patch to an already loaded ROM image using an explicit display name for the patch layer.
      Parameters:
      baseRom - base ROM image
      patchFilename - IPS patch path
      patchDisplayName - patch name shown in the UI and save identity
      Returns:
      patched ROM image
      Throws:
      IOException - when the patch file cannot be read

    • FromBytes

      public static ROM FromBytes(String filename, byte[] romBytes, String displayName)
      Creates a ROM directly from raw bytes.
      Parameters:
      filename - source path or identifier
      romBytes - ROM bytes
      displayName - name to show in the UI
      Returns:
      ROM image instance

    • FromBytes

      public static ROM FromBytes(String filename, byte[] romBytes, String displayName, List<String> patchNames, List<String> patchSourcePaths)
      Creates a ROM directly from raw bytes while preserving patch identity.
      Parameters:
      filename - source path or identifier
      romBytes - ROM bytes
      displayName - name to show in the UI
      patchNames - applied patch display names
      patchSourcePaths - applied patch source paths
      Returns:
      ROM image instance

    • GetData

      public int[] GetData()
      Returns the ROM bytes as unsigned values.
      Returns:
      ROM byte array

    • GetCartridgeTypeCode

      public int GetCartridgeTypeCode()
      Returns the raw cartridge type byte from the ROM header.
      Returns:
      cartridge type code

    • GetMapperType

      public CartridgeMapperType GetMapperType()
      Returns the mapper family derived from the header.
      Returns:
      mapper family

    • GetDeclaredRomBankCount

      public int GetDeclaredRomBankCount()
      Returns the bank count declared by the header.
      Returns:
      declared ROM bank count

    • GetEffectiveRomBankCount

      public int GetEffectiveRomBankCount()
      Returns the effective bank count derived from the file length.
      Returns:
      effective ROM bank count

    • GetExternalRamSizeBytes

      public int GetExternalRamSizeBytes()
      Returns the external RAM size in bytes.
      Returns:
      external RAM size

    • HasBatteryBackedSave

      public boolean HasBatteryBackedSave()
      Returns whether this cartridge uses battery-backed save storage.
      Returns:
      true when the cartridge should persist save RAM

    • IsCgbCompatible

      public boolean IsCgbCompatible()
      Returns whether the cartridge advertises CGB compatibility.
      Returns:
      true when the header marks the ROM as Game Boy Color capable

    • IsCgbEnhanced

      public boolean IsCgbEnhanced()
      Returns whether the cartridge can boot on both GB and GBC hardware while exposing GBC-specific enhancements when available.
      Returns:
      true when the ROM is dual-mode rather than GBC-only

    • IsCgbOnly

      public boolean IsCgbOnly()
      Returns whether the cartridge requires Game Boy Color hardware.
      Returns:
      true when the ROM cannot boot in DMG mode

    • GetSourcePath

      public String GetSourcePath()
      Returns the original ROM source path used to create this cartridge image.
      Returns:
      source ROM path

    • GetName

      public String GetName()
      Returns the ROM display name without the file extension.
      Returns:
      ROM display name

    • GetPatchNames

      public List<String> GetPatchNames()
      Returns the applied IPS patch names in application order.
      Returns:
      patch display names

    • GetPatchSourcePaths

      public List<String> GetPatchSourcePaths()
      Returns the applied IPS patch source paths in application order.
      Returns:
      patch source paths

    • GetSourceName

      public String GetSourceName()
      Returns the underlying ROM filename without the file extension.
      Returns:
      source ROM name

    • GetHeaderTitle

      public String GetHeaderTitle()
      Returns the title stored in the cartridge header when present.
      Returns:
      header title

    • ToByteArray

      public byte[] ToByteArray()
      Returns a byte-for-byte copy of the ROM image.

      ROM bytes
